title: cinnamomum selangorense
intro: Cinnamomum selangorense is a species of evergreen tree native to Malaysia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cinnamomum selangorense include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
